title: sir.enforceability.v0
description: Enforceability analysis result. Describes whether the SIR kernel can prevent, detect, or is blind to an action in the active protection mode. This is a per-action per-mode claim, not a global guarantee.

class.description: enforces=kernel can block the action before it executes; detects=kernel can observe and record but cannot prevent; blind=kernel has no signal and cannot act or record.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of this enforceability classification, including which signals and mode properties drove the decision.
